# Example .tfvars file
# To use this, remove `.txt` from the filename and fill in variables accordingly.

# Do NOT commit the real tfvars file to GitHub

env_name            = "sdp-dev"
image_tag           = "latest"
api_name            = "prt_api"
stage               = "dev"
service_subdomain   = "prt-api"
domain              = "sdp-dev"
